financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Meta Platforms, Inc. engages in the development of products that enable people to connect and share with friends and family through mobile devices, personal computers, virtual reality (VR) headsets, and AI glasses in the United States, Canada, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Family of Apps (FoA) and Reality Labs (RL). The FoA segment offers Facebook, which enables people to build community through feed, reels, stories, groups, marketplace, and other; Instagram that brings people closer through Instag...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Meta Platforms's revenue was $200.97 billion, an increase of 22.17% compared to the previous year's $164.50 billion. Earnings were $60.46 billion, a decrease of -3.05%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 63 analysts, the average rating for META stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $827.91, which is an increase of 36.85% from the latest price.

data.title: How to stop people from using your Instagram posts with Meta's AI
data.text: Instagram profiles default to letting users share and modify their content with Meta's new AI model. The feature allows users to download your posts, including your profile picture, to "reuse" them.

data.title: Meta to build C$13 billion Alberta data center, its first in Canada
data.text: Tech giant Meta announced ​Wednesday it will build a massive data center in central Alberta, the company's first ‌in Canada, as it rapidly builds out computing capacity to support the global AI boom.

data.title: Facebook users keep accidentally posting onto Threads — and Threads users love it.
data.text: Meta's Threads says it has 500 million monthly active users. A lot of those people are cross-posting from Facebook or Instagram.

data.text: Meta Platforms said on Tuesday it is rolling out Muse Image, its first image-generation model from ​Meta Superintelligence Labs, as the Facebook owner ‌expands generative AI tools across its apps.

data.title: Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
data.text: Meta Superintelligence Labs, led by Alexandr Wang, is releasing its first artificial intelligence model for image creation. Dubbed Muse Image, Meta is hoping to attract creators and advertisers.

data.title: Why Wall Street Is Fired Up About Earnings—and Why There May Be Some Concern
data.text: Higher prices for raw materials and semiconductors were likely a boon to S&P 500 earnings last quarter. They could also be a risk.
